name: Pulse Oil Corp.
summary: Pulse Oil Corp. engages in the ownership and operation of oil and gas assets in Alberta. It owns 100% interests in the Bigoray assets covering approximately 10,088 net acres of land in the Bigoray area of Alberta; and the Queenstown assets covering approximately 27,686 net acres of land in the Queenstown area of Alberta. The company was formerly known as Wolfpack Capital Corp. and changed its name to Pulse Oil Corp. in December 2016. Pulse Oil Corp. was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
